changeSet.author: ADMIN (generated)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope (name, uri_pattern, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, forward_type, forward_data) VALUES ('NHSV-VIEW-ALL-CHAT-ROOM', 'get:/api/v1/brokerChat/chatRooms', NULL, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'CONNECTION', '{ "uri": "get:/api/v1/brokerChat/chatRooms", "service": "nhsv-admin", "forwardType": "SERVICE" }') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE uri_pattern = VALUES(uri_pattern), created_by = VALUES(created_by), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), created_at = VALUES(created_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at), forward_type = VALUES(forward_type), forward_data = VALUES(forward_data);

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_open_api ( id, operation_id, tags, uri_pattern, summary, `security`, parameters, request_body, responses, description, `version`, created_at, updated_at ) SELECT id, name, '["NHSV-ADMIN"]', uri_pattern, name, '[{"jwt": []}]', '[{"in":"path","name":"pageNumber","schema":{"type":"number"},"description":"Page Number"}, {"in":"path","name":"pageSize","schema":{"type":"number"},"description":"Page Size"}, {"in":"path","name":"keyword","schema":{"type":"string"},"description":"Keyword"}]', '[]', '{"200":{"brokers":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"totalChatRooms":{"type":"number"},"currentPage":{"type":"number"},"pageSize":{"type":"number"},"totalView":{"type":"number"},"chatRooms":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"number"},"groupName":{"type":"string"},"introduction":{"type":"string"},"photo":{"type":"string"},"brokerName":{"type":"string"},"brokerId":{"type":"number"},"socialLinks":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string"},"link":{"type":"string"}}}}}}}}}}},"description":"OK"},"401":{"description":"Your access token is invalid or expired"}}', 'get All Chat Room', '/api/v1', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope WHERE name = 'NHSV-VIEW-ALL-CHAT-ROOM' ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE operation_id = VALUES(operation_id), tags = VALUES(tags), uri_pattern = VALUES(uri_pattern), summary = VALUES(summary), `security` = VALUES(`security`), parameters = '[{"in":"path","name":"pageNumber","schema":{"type":"number"},"description":"Page Number"}, {"in":"path","name":"pageSize","schema":{"type":"number"},"description":"Page Size"}, {"in":"path","name":"keyword","schema":{"type":"string"},"description":"Keyword"}]', request_body = VALUES(request_body), responses = VALUES(responses), description = VALUES(description), `version` = VALUES(`version`), created_at = VALUES(created_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at);

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts JOIN `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg ON ts.name = 'NHSV-VIEW-ALL-CHAT-ROOM' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'PUBLIC' ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE scope_id = VALUES(scope_id), scope_group_id = VALUES(scope_group_id);
